raw_cv_text:
Piet Burduja
+44 7911 534 628 | Email: piet.burduja@gmail.com | LinkedIn: piet-burduja | GitHub: PietBurduja | https://pietburduja.dev
EDUCATION
University of Waterloo | Bachelor of Computer Science, Honours Co-op 2020 - 2024
Achieved 3.8/4.0 GPA and received Dean's Honours List recognition for three consecutive years
Led web development track in campus coding competition, mentoring 12 first-year students on React fundamentals
University of Toronto | Summer Bridge Program - Advanced Web Technologies June 2022 - August 2022
Completed intensive 12-week full-stack bootcamp with focus on modern frontend frameworks and TypeScript
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Frontend Engineer Intern May 2023 - August 2023
Refactored payment form components reducing bundle size by 23% through tree-shaking optimization and lazy loading
Implemented real-time validation UI for merchant dashboard, decreasing form submission errors by 18% across 50K+
daily active users
Collaborated with design team to migrate 8 legacy components to new Stripe Design System, improving accessibility
score from 72 to 94
Notion | Junior Frontend Developer September 2023 - Present
Developed interactive table filtering feature used by 2.3M+ workspace members, increasing engagement time by 12%
Optimized React component rendering performance through memoization and virtualization, reducing initial page load
time by 31%
Led A/B testing initiative for dark mode UI variant, achieving 64% user adoption within 6 weeks
Figma | Frontend Engineering Co-op January 2022 - April 2022
Built WebSocket-based real-time collaboration indicator component handling concurrent updates from 50+ simultaneous
users with <100ms latency
Reduced CSS-in-JS runtime overhead by 27% through static extraction and CSS module conversion across design panel
modules
Debugged and fixed critical SVG rendering bug affecting 8% of canvas interactions, preventing 15K+ daily frustration
incidents
PROJECTS
PixelFlow | React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Firebase March 2023 - June 2023
Built collaborative image editing web app with real-time layer synchronization across 5 simultaneous editors, achieving
99.2% uptime
Implemented WebGL-based image filters reducing processing time by 68% compared to canvas-based solution
CodeSnap | Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Vercel July 2022 - October 2022
Created code snippet management platform with syntax highlighting, attracting 340+ GitHub stars and 12K monthly
visitors
Optimized database queries reducing average page load time from 1.8s to 420ms through strategic indexing and caching
VoiceChat Dashboard | Vue.js, WebRTC, Node.js, Socket.io November 2022 - February 2023
Engineered real-time audio/video call metrics dashboard handling 500+ concurrent peer connections with 94% accuracy
in latency reporting
Decreased dashboard load time by 45% implementing virtual scrolling for metrics tables containing 50K+ data points
OpenUI Components Library | React, Storybook, TypeScript, npm August 2021 - Present
Contributed 18 accessible UI components to open-source library, accumulating 2,100+ npm weekly downloads
Improved component test coverage from 56% to 89%, reducing production bugs by 34% in dependent projects
PerformanceMonitor Browser Extension | JavaScript (Vanilla), Chrome Extension API, D3.js May 2021 - August 2021
Developed Chrome extension providing real-time Core Web Vitals visualization for 1,200+ active users
Achieved 4.7/5.0 rating on Chrome Web Store with 89% positive reviews
EXTRACURRICULAR
Frontend Masters Study Group | Co-Organizer & Mentor January 2022 - Present
Organized bi-weekly study sessions on advanced React patterns for 35+ members, creating comprehensive learning
materials covering hooks and state management
Mentored 8 junior developers transitioning into tech roles, with 6 successfully landing frontend internships within 6
months
React Toronto Meetup & HackTO Conference | Speaker & Volunteer March 2023
Delivered 45-minute technical talk on 'Performance Optimization in Large-Scale React Applications' to 120+ developers,
receiving 4.8/5.0 average feedback score
Volunteered as frontend track mentor at HackTO 2023, guiding 24 participants to build 6 production-ready projects
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, SQL
Technologies – React, Next.js, Vue.js, Redux, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, Material-UI, Styled Components, Jest, React Testing
Library, GraphQL, REST APIs, WebRTC, Socket.io
Tools – Git, GitHub, Webpack, Vite, Chrome DevTools, VS Code, Figma, Storybook, JIRA, Vercel, Netlify, Firebase,
PostgreSQL
name: Piet Burduja +44
